title: Walking with the Lord—what sweetness
publicDomainBasis: Albert Benjamin Simpson (1843–1919), Albert Benjamin Simpson (1843–1919). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Walking with the Lord—what sweetness!
Despite outward suffering,
Step by step, His footsteps’ impress,
His strait way I’m following.

sections.label: Chorus
Chorus
Chorus
